revelationExceptions: Revealed at Mina on Last Hajj, but regarded as Madinan sura

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: When the victory of Allah has come and the conquest,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: When Allah’s ˹ultimate˺ help comes and the victory ˹over Mecca is achieved˺,

ayahs.textArabic: وَرَأَيۡتَ ٱلنَّاسَ يَدۡخُلُونَ فِي دِينِ ٱللَّهِ أَفۡوَاجٗا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Waraayta alnnasa yadkhuloona fee deeni Allahi afwajan
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And you see the people entering into the religion of Allah in multitudes,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and you ˹O Prophet˺ see the people embracing Allah’s Way in crowds,

ayahs.textArabic: فَسَبِّحۡ بِحَمۡدِ رَبِّكَ وَٱسۡتَغۡفِرۡهُۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ تَوَّابَۢا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Fasabbih bihamdi rabbika waistaghfirhu innahu kana tawwaban
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Then exalt [Him] with praise of your Lord and ask forgiveness of Him. Indeed, He is ever Accepting of repentance.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: then glorify the praises of your Lord and seek His forgiveness, for certainly He is ever Accepting of Repentance.
